title: Cross-repository dependency register
description: Unified register of cross-repository dependencies discovered for a single assessment. Produced by scripts/build_cross_repo_register.py and consumed by the STRIDE dispatcher (slice_cross_repo_for_component.py), coverage_checks.check_cross_repo, and Phase 11 §5 / §7 renderers. Each entry has an unambiguous `source` field that records where it came from. Declared entries always carry interface_findings; sibling and recon entries never do.

type.description: For recon entries: scm-sibling | saas. Null for declared/sibling/submodule entries.

discovery_hint.description: Free-form hint about where the entry was discovered (file:line, submodule path, sibling directory).

interface_findings.description: Populated for `declared` entries when the threat model was found or outdated. Other sources never carry findings (metadata-only).

consumer_declares.description: Verbatim copy of the consumer-declared expectations from `docs/related-repos.yaml` (`expected_auth`, `expected_validation`). Null when the consumer declared none.

upstream_properties.description: Architecture properties extracted from the dependency's threat-model.yaml at the declared interface. Treat as upstream-asserted evidence — never as verified fact. Populated for `declared` entries only when the threat model was found or outdated AND the declared interface substring-matches an `attack_surface[].entry_point`.

matched_entry_point.description: The attack_surface[].entry_point string that matched the declared interface.

match_confidence.description: How the entry point was matched. `substring` is the default; `exact` reserved for future interface-id matching; `none` means upstream_properties was populated from component-level fallback only.

upstream_auth_signal.description: Free-form auth hint extracted from attack_surface[].notes or security_controls[] of the handling components — verbatim string from upstream TM, used for expectation comparison.

controls.description: Subset of upstream security_controls[] attached to handling_components, with provenance preserved.

provenance.description: Trust marker — always `upstream-asserted` for this block. Consumers MUST NOT lower local severity based on this evidence.

staleness_days.description: Days between upstream `meta.generated` and the current loader run. Null when generated date missing.

expectation_mismatch.description: Deterministic comparison of `consumer_declares` against `upstream_properties`. Each populated field marks a concrete mismatch — null/empty means no mismatch detected (or no expectation declared).

auth.description: Human-readable mismatch description when consumer expected_auth does not match upstream auth signal. Format: `expected '<value>' but upstream signals '<value or unknown>'`.

validation.description: Human-readable mismatch description when consumer expected_validation does not match any upstream control.
